metadata.note: Gemini 3.1 Pro excluded — API key leaked (403 PERMISSION_DENIED). 3 of 4 planned judges scored.

gpt-5.2.key_observation: Handled sarcasm calmly and became helpful, but tone was templated and missed proactive next-step

grok-4.key_observation: Fails to acknowledge or defuse sarcasm; uses AI slop language

deepseek.key_observation: Acknowledges sarcasm but responds with mismatched register

gpt-5.2.key_observation: Failed to infer needs from context; over-used fallback

grok-4.key_observation: Completely misses travel fatigue cue; only handles explicit requests

deepseek.key_observation: 27% fallback rate with two FALLBACK responses in a 3-turn conversation

gpt-5.2.key_observation: Initially misread anger; de-escalation was late

grok-4.key_observation: Tone-deaf opener kills engagement; no proactive de-escalation

deepseek.key_observation: Opens with 'I'd love to help explore rewards!' to angry guest spending $10K

gpt-5.2.key_observation: Strong dining guidance, then abrupt fallback at moment of closure

grok-4.key_observation: Broken confirmation handling; zero cross-domain proactivity

deepseek.key_observation: Excellent dining info but 'Great, we'll do that' triggers fallback — terrible UX

gpt-5.2.key_observation: Provided crisis hotlines but repeated identical text; failed to respond to guest's specific request for on-site help

grok-4.key_observation: Resources good but repetitive identical responses kill engagement

deepseek.key_observation: 3x identical response to escalating crisis. Zero adaptation. 2/10 crisis handling.

systemic_issues: Fallback cascade: 27% of turns trigger 'I don't have enough details' — including simple confirmations like 'Great, we'll do that'
Crisis response rigidity: Identical word-for-word response regardless of guest's evolving disclosure
AI slop language: 'I'd be delighted', 'Ah, wonderful!', 'incredible' persist despite anti-slop guidance
Zero agentic proactivity: No cross-domain suggestions after answering primary question
Tone-deaf anger handling: 'I'd love to help explore rewards!' to guest threatening to blast on TripAdvisor
